---
title: "BF-NEE Diagnostics"
---

# Biodiversity Footprint of Natural Ecosystem Extent (BF-NEE)

This website provides exploratory analyses and diagnostic checks for the BF-NEE indicator.

The indicator links agricultural land expansion from LandSHIFT with ecosystem extent information from GlobES and attributes resulting ecosystem loss to commodity consumption.

## Objectives

The diagnostics focus on:

- Global BF-NEE trends over time
- Main drivers of the global footprint
- Germany's contribution to natural ecosystem displacement
- Spatial hotspot analysis
- Consistency checks between BF-NEE and GlobES ecosystem loss
- Data quality and processing diagnostics

## Available analyses

### Processing status

Country-level diagnostics and identification of outputs that were generated using outdated scaling assumptions.

### Global trends

Development of BF-NEE between 1995 and 2015.

### Country drivers

Identification of countries contributing most strongly to global BF-NEE.

### Commodity drivers

Identification of agricultural commodities contributing most strongly to ecosystem displacement.

### Maps

Spatial distribution of BF-NEE and natural ecosystem loss.

## Current status

Analyses currently use only countries that passed the processing and scale diagnostics.

Countries that still contain outputs generated prior to the cell-area correction are excluded until recalculated.
